    if line.strip():
        a,_=line.split('\t')
        xs.append(float(a.replace(',','.')))
# assess simple transforms vs index linearity
n=len(xs)
idx=list(range(n))
for name,vals in [('x',xs),('1/x',[1/x for x in xs]),('logx',[math.log(x) for x in xs]),('sqrtx',[math.sqrt(x) for x in xs]),('1/sqrtx',[1/math.sqrt(x) for x in xs])]:
    # correlation with index
    mean_i=sum(idx)/n
    mean_v=sum(vals)/n
    cov=sum((i-mean_i)*(v-mean_v) for i,v in zip(idx,vals))
    var_i=sum((i-mean_i)**2 for i in idx)
    var_v=sum((v-mean_v)**2 for v in vals)
    r=cov/(var_i*var_v)**0.5
    print(name, 'corr_with_index', r)

from pathlib import Path
from math import inf
xs=[]; ys=[]
for line in Path('/app/graphene.dat').read_text().splitlines():
    a,b=line.split('\t')
    xs.append(float(a.replace(',','.')))
    ys.append(float(b.replace(',','.')))
# try brute-force Lorentzian+offset fits for candidate refs/windows
refs=[('rayleigh', xs[max(range(len(ys)), key=lambda i: ys[i])]), ('532nm', 1e7/532.0), ('514.5nm', 1e7/514.5)]
windows={
    'G': [(131,138),(132,139),(133,140),(134,141),(135,142)],
    '2D': [(147,154),(148,155),(149,156),(150,157)]
}
for refname,ref in refs:
    print('\nREF',refname,ref)
    shifts=[ref-x for x in xs]
    for peak,ws in windows.items():
        best=None
        for start,end in ws:
            xx=shifts[start-1:end]
            yy=ys[start-1:end]
            xmin=min(xx); xmax=max(xx)
            # search x0 in expanded range, gamma positive
            for x0 in [xmin-100 + i*5 for i in range(int((xmax-xmin+200)/5)+1)]:
                for gamma in [10+i*5 for i in range(120)]:
                    # solve least squares for y = offset + amplitude * L
                    s1=sL=sLL=sy=syL=0.0
                    for x,y in zip(xx,yy):
                        L=gamma*gamma/((x-x0)*(x-x0)+gamma*gamma)
                        s1 += 1.0
                        sL += L
                        sLL += L*L
                        sy += y
                        syL += y*L
                    det=s1*sLL-sL*sL
                    if abs(det)<1e-12:
                        continue
                    offset=(sy*sLL-syL*sL)/det
                    amp=(s1*syL-sL*sy)/det
                    sse=0.0
                    for x,y in zip(xx,yy):
                        L=gamma*gamma/((x-x0)*(x-x0)+gamma*gamma)
                        pred=offset+amp*L
                        sse += (pred-y)**2
                    cand=(sse,start,end,x0,gamma,amp,offset)
                    if best is None or sse<best[0]:
                        best=cand
        print(peak,best)

from pathlib import Path
xs=[]; ys=[]
for line in Path('/app/graphene.dat').read_text().splitlines():
    a,b=line.split('\t')
    xs.append(float(a.replace(',','.')))
    ys.append(float(b.replace(',','.')))
ref=1e7/532.0
sh=[ref-x for x in xs]
for peak,bounds,windows in [
    ('G',(1500,1650),[(139,142),(140,143),(139,143),(140,144),(141,144),(139,144)]),
    ('2D',(2600,2800),[(154,157),(155,158),(154,158),(153,158),(154,159)])
]:
    print('\n'+peak)
    for start,end in windows:
        xx=sh[start-1:end]
        yy=ys[start-1:end]
        best=None
        for x0_i in range(int(bounds[0]*2), int(bounds[1]*2)+1):
            x0=x0_i/2
            for g_i in range(10,2001):
                gamma=g_i/2
                s1=sL=sLL=sy=syL=0.0
                for x,y in zip(xx,yy):
                    hw=0.5*gamma
                    L=hw*hw/((x-x0)*(x-x0)+hw*hw)
                    s1+=1; sL+=L; sLL+=L*L; sy+=y; syL+=y*L
                det=s1*sLL-sL*sL
                if abs(det)<1e-12: continue
                off=(sy*sLL-syL*sL)/det
                amp=(s1*syL-sL*sy)/det
                if amp<0: continue
                sse=sum((off+amp*((0.5*gamma)**2/((x-x0)*(x-x0)+(0.5*gamma)**2))-y)**2 for x,y in zip(xx,yy))
                cand=(sse,x0,gamma,amp,off)
                if best is None or sse<best[0]: best=cand
        print('window',start,end,best)
